location: Starting equipment for the Vagabond class. Otherwise purchasable for 1,200 Runes from the Nomadic Merchant camped east of the Saintsbridge Site of Grace in northern Limgrave.
tactics: No fight required if buying it — just have 1,200 Runes and talk to the merchant by the roadside campfire (approaching stops the music he's playing).
Starting as Vagabond is the free alternative, skipping the purchase entirely.
Shares its base moveset and stats with the Banished Knight's Halberd, just without the engraved knightly look.
lore: A long-handled polearm that combines the reach of a spear with the cleaving edge of an axe, equally suited to pressing a single foe with thrusts or sweeping through a crowd.

builds.name: Beginner Strength/Dexterity Quality
builds.why: Even D/D scaling and generous reach make it a forgiving early-game weapon for learning poise-trading and spacing.
